subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-07 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: At the moment when the self gaineth dominion over man, it visiteth upon him every affliction. For the space of an hour it casteth him into thoughts of supremacy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفس وقتی که بر انسان مسلط می شود هر بلائی بسر انسان می آورد.  یک ساعت بخیال ریاست می اندازد
subcodes.subjects: @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
